clientDescription: Client for interacting with Amazon Simple Queue Service (SQS) to send, receive, and manage messages and queues.

functions.name: sendMessage
functions.description: Delivers a message to the specified queue.

functions.name: receiveMessage
functions.description: Retrieves one or more messages (up to 10), from the specified queue.

functions.name: deleteMessage
functions.description: Deletes the specified message from the specified queue.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: deleteMessageBatch
functions.description: Deletes up to ten messages from the specified queue.

functions.name: sendMessageBatch
functions.description: You can use SendMessageBatch to send up to 10 messages to the specified queue by assigning either identical or different values to each message (or by not assigning values at all).

functions.name: createQueue
functions.description: Creates a new standard or FIFO queue.

functions.name: deleteQueue
functions.description: Deletes the queue specified by the QueueUrl, regardless of the queue's contents.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: getQueueUrl
functions.description: The GetQueueUrl API returns the URL of an existing Amazon SQS queue.

functions.name: getQueueAttributes
functions.description: Gets attributes for the specified queue.

functions.name: setQueueAttributes
functions.description: Sets the value of one or more queue attributes, like a policy.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: listQueues
functions.description: Returns a list of your queues in the current region.

functions.name: purgeQueue
functions.description: Deletes available messages in a queue (including in-flight messages) specified by the QueueURL parameter.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: changeMessageVisibility
functions.description: Changes the visibility timeout of a specified message in a queue to a new value.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: changeMessageVisibilityBatch
functions.description: Changes the visibility timeout of multiple messages.

functions.name: listDeadLetterSourceQueues
functions.description: Returns a list of your queues that have the RedrivePolicy queue attribute configured with a dead-letter queue.

functions.name: addPermission
functions.description: Adds a permission to a queue for a specific principal.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: removePermission
functions.description: Revokes any permissions in the queue policy that matches the specified Label parameter.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: tagQueue
functions.description: Add cost allocation tags to the specified Amazon SQS queue.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: untagQueue
functions.description: Remove cost allocation tags from the specified Amazon SQS queue.

return.description: An error if the operation fails

functions.name: listQueueTags
functions.description: List all cost allocation tags added to the specified Amazon SQS queue.

functions.name: startMessageMoveTask
functions.description: Starts an asynchronous task to move messages from a specified source queue to a specified destination queue.

functions.name: cancelMessageMoveTask
functions.description: Cancels a specified message movement task.

functions.name: listMessageMoveTasks
functions.description: Gets the most recent message movement tasks (up to 10) under a specific source queue.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue to which a message is sent.

fields.name: messageBody
fields.description: The message to send.

fields.name: delaySeconds
fields.description: The length of time, in seconds, for which to delay a specific message.

fields.name: messageAttributes
fields.description: Each message attribute consists of a Name, Type, and Value.

fields.name: messageSystemAttributes
fields.description: The message system attribute to send.

fields.name: messageDeduplicationId
fields.description: This parameter applies only to FIFO (first-in-first-out) queues.

fields.name: messageGroupId
fields.description: This parameter applies only to FIFO (first-in-first-out) queues.

fields.name: md5OfMessageBody
fields.description: An MD5 digest of the non-URL-encoded message body string.

fields.name: md5OfMessageAttributes
fields.description: An MD5 digest of the non-URL-encoded message attribute string.

fields.name: md5OfMessageSystemAttributes
fields.description: An MD5 digest of the non-URL-encoded message system attribute string.

fields.name: messageId
fields.description: An attribute containing the MessageId of the message sent to the queue.

fields.name: sequenceNumber
fields.description: This parameter applies only to FIFO (first-in-first-out) queues.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue from which messages are received.

fields.name: attributeNames
fields.description: Deprecated.

fields.name: messageSystemAttributeNames
fields.description: A list of attributes that need to be returned along with each message.

fields.name: messageAttributeNames
fields.description: The name of the message attribute, where N is the index.

fields.name: maxNumberOfMessages
fields.description: The maximum number of messages to return.

fields.name: visibilityTimeout
fields.description: The duration (in seconds) that the received messages are hidden from subsequent retrieve requests after being retrieved by a ReceiveMessage request.

fields.name: waitTimeSeconds
fields.description: The duration (in seconds) for which the call waits for a message to arrive in the queue before returning.

fields.name: receiveRequestAttemptId
fields.description: This parameter applies only to FIFO (first-in-first-out) queues.

fields.name: messages
fields.description: A list of messages.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue from which messages are deleted.

fields.name: receiptHandle
fields.description: The receipt handle associated with the message to delete.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue from which messages are deleted.

fields.name: entries
fields.description: Lists the receipt handles for the messages to be deleted.

fields.name: successful
fields.description: A list of DeleteMessageBatchResultEntry items.

fields.name: failed
fields.description: A list of BatchResultErrorEntry items.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue to which batched messages are sent.

fields.name: entries
fields.description: A list of SendMessageBatchRequestEntry items.

fields.name: successful
fields.description: A list of SendMessageBatchResultEntry items.

fields.name: failed
fields.description: A list of BatchResultErrorEntry items with error details about each message that can't be enqueued.

fields.name: queueName
fields.description: The name of the new queue.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: A map of attributes with their corresponding values.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Add cost allocation tags to the specified Amazon SQS queue.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the created Amazon SQS queue.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue to delete.

fields.name: queueName
fields.description: (Required) The name of the queue for which you want to fetch the URL.

fields.name: queueOwnerAWSAccountId
fields.description: (Optional) The Amazon Web Services account ID of the account that created the queue.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the queue.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue whose attribute information is retrieved.

fields.name: attributeNames
fields.description: A list of attributes for which to retrieve information.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: A map of attributes to their respective values.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue whose attributes are set.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: A map of attributes to set.

fields.name: queueUrls
fields.description: A list of queue URLs, up to 1,000 entries, or the value of MaxResults that you sent in the request.

fields.name: nextToken
fields.description: Pagination token to include in the next request.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the queue from which the PurgeQueue action deletes messages.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue whose message's visibility is changed.

fields.name: receiptHandle
fields.description: The receipt handle associated with the message, whose visibility timeout is changed.

fields.name: visibilityTimeout
fields.description: The new value for the message's visibility timeout (in seconds).

fields.name: queueUrl

fields.name: entries
fields.description: Lists the receipt handles of the messages for which the visibility timeout must be changed.

fields.name: successful
fields.description: A list of ChangeMessageVisibilityBatchResultEntry items.

fields.name: failed

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of a dead-letter queue.

fields.name: nextToken
fields.description: Pagination token to request the next set of results.

fields.name: maxResults
fields.description: Maximum number of results to include in the response.

fields.name: queueUrls

fields.name: nextToken
fields.description: Pagination token to include in the next request.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue to which permissions are added.

fields.name: label
fields.description: The unique identification of the permission you're setting (for example, AliceSendMessage).

fields.name: awsAccountIds
fields.description: The Amazon Web Services account numbers of the principals who are to receive permission.

fields.name: actions
fields.description: The action the client wants to allow for the specified principal.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue from which permissions are removed.

fields.name: label
fields.description: The identification of the permission to remove.

fields.name: queueUrl

fields.description: The list of tags to be added to the specified queue.

fields.description: The URL of the queue.

fields.name: tagKeys
fields.description: The list of tags to be removed from the specified queue.

fields.name: queueUrl
fields.description: The URL of the queue.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: The list of all tags added to the specified queue.

fields.name: sourceArn
fields.description: The ARN of the queue that contains the messages to be moved to another queue.

fields.name: destinationArn
fields.description: The ARN of the queue that receives the moved messages.

fields.name: maxNumberOfMessagesPerSecond
fields.description: The number of messages to be moved per second (the message movement rate).

fields.name: taskHandle
fields.description: An identifier associated with a message movement task.

fields.name: taskHandle
fields.description: An identifier associated with a message movement task.

fields.name: approximateNumberOfMessagesMoved
fields.description: The approximate number of messages already moved to the destination queue.

fields.name: sourceArn
fields.description: The ARN of the queue whose message movement tasks are to be listed.

fields.name: maxResults
fields.description: The maximum number of results to include in the response.

fields.name: results
fields.description: A list of message movement tasks and their attributes.

fields.name: stringValue
fields.description: Strings are Unicode with UTF-8 binary encoding.

fields.name: binaryValue
fields.description: Binary type attributes can store any binary data, such as compressed data, encrypted data, or images.

fields.name: stringListValues
fields.description: Not implemented.

fields.name: binaryListValues

fields.description: Amazon SQS supports the following logical data types: String, Number, and Binary.

fields.name: md5OfMessageAttributes

fields.description: An identifier associated with a message movement task.

fields.description: The status of the message movement task.

fields.name: sourceArn
fields.description: The ARN of the queue that contains the messages to be moved to another queue.

fields.name: destinationArn
fields.description: The ARN of the destination queue if it has been specified in the StartMessageMoveTask request.

fields.name: maxNumberOfMessagesPerSecond
fields.description: The number of messages to be moved per second (the message movement rate), if it has been specified in the StartMessageMoveTask request.

fields.name: approximateNumberOfMessagesMoved
fields.description: The approximate number of messages already moved to the destination queue.

fields.name: approximateNumberOfMessagesToMove

fields.name: failureReason
fields.description: The task failure reason (only included if the task status is FAILED).

fields.name: startedTimestamp
fields.description: The timestamp of starting the message movement task.
